description:
You are a Management Analyst at a manufacturing firm conducting a business process improvement project. Document the company's Purchase-to-Pay (P2P) business process as a swim lane flowchart for a process audit based on the specification at ~/Desktop/p2p_process_spec.txt. 

Create a complete swim lane process diagram in draw.io with exactly 5 horizontal lanes: (1) Requester, (2) Procurement, (3) Accounts Payable, (4) Supplier, (5) Finance/Treasury. The diagram must include at least 12 process steps, 3 decision diamonds (budget approval, 3-way matching, payment approval), 2 parallel flow branches, 1 exception/rejection path, data objects (Purchase Requisition, Purchase Order, Goods Receipt, Invoice), and Start/End events. 

Add a second page titled 'KPI Dashboard' that lists at least 5 Key Performance Indicators for the P2P process as a table or structured diagram (e.g., cycle time, first-pass match rate, PO compliance %). Save the project as ~/Desktop/p2p_process.drawio and export it as ~/Desktop/p2p_process.pdf.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
